title: チューリップ賞にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet is locked and loaded for the Tulip
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To her surprise, it turns out her rival, Vodka, is
running there as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to beat Vodka and prove that she's
number one.
